tasks.label: EP: Erase Image Store Selector
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/rp2040.cfg -c 'adapter speed 5000; init; reset halt; flash erase_address pad 0x10200000 0x10000; reset run; exit'

tasks.label: EP: Erase Full Image Store (8MB)
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/rp2040.cfg -c 'adapter speed 5000; init; reset halt; flash erase_address pad 0x10200000 0x800000; reset run; exit'
